case_title: SHTEYNBERG, VLADIMIR et al VS DOLINSKY, JANET et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHTEYNBERG, VLADIMIR SHTEYNBERG, JOSEPHINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOLINSKY, JANET AVERBUH, VECHESLAV $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $595.00, DEFENDANT DOLINSKY, JANET IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
